title: Account settings view should reflect latest draft build
excerpt: Account settings view seemingly only reflects the latest Live version, which is not the same as other features. This makes it a pain to develop for as it would require making a new app version for every build change.

posts.author: sam-evans (Sam Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Account settings view seemingly only reflects the latest Live version, which is not the same as other features. This makes it a pain to develop for as it would require making a new app version for every build change.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @sam-evans for the request!

And welcome to the community!
